query:
ALTER TABLE leads 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS phone VARCHAR(64),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS stripe_customer_id VARCHAR(64),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS stripe_paid BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE;
